data.description:
## Description
Implement the complexity adapter behind the analyzer interface using lizard (pip dep from the [metrics] extra) for real per-function cyclomatic complexity (CCN) across ~25 languages. Populates AnalyzerResult.complexity.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Adapter runs lizard over the configured scan root; returns per-file/aggregate CCN (and optionally token/param counts).
- [ ] lizard unavailable (extra not installed) -> Unavailable via the guard, not ImportError.
- [ ] Cross-language: exercised on at least Python + one non-Python fixture.

## Verification
- [ ] Unit tests over small fixtures for Python and one other language.
- [ ] Guard test: extra absent -> Unavailable.

## Dependencies: Children 1, 2, 3
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/adapters/lizard_complexity.py (new), tests/unit/metrics/test_lizard_complexity.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M (2 files)
data.title: Complexity analyzer adapter via lizard (true cyclomatic CCN, polyglot)
